_comment: WCTA Cyber tool library data. Edit this file to add/remove tools - no code changes needed. Each tool needs: category, name, url, description. Categories repeat freely; the page groups them automatically.

tools.name: OSI Model Explorer
tools.description: An interactive OSI Model exploration app

tools.name: Ports and Protocols
tools.description: An interactive Ports and Protocols exploration app

tools.name: IP & Subnet Explorer
tools.description: An IP v4 Address and Subnet interactive dashboard

tools.name: TCP/UDP Race Simulator
tools.description: A simulation showing the differences between both protocols

tools.name: Network Topology Builder
tools.description: A walkthrough of the various network topologies

tools.name: Network Diagram Decoder
tools.description: A network diagram simulator and decoder

tools.name: Attack Type Identifier
tools.description: Defines and helps identify different types of cyber attacks

tools.name: Firewall ACL Builder
tools.description: An interactive walkthrough on setting up firewall access control lists

tools.name: Encryption Explorer
tools.description: A reference and simulation of different types of encryption

tools.name: CLI Command Sandbox
tools.description: Test and quiz on CLI network commands, both Linux and Windows
